# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function sum: int (n: int)
  entry:
      s_1 = 0
      i_1 = 0
      i_2 = 1
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      i_3 = PHI (i_2, entry), (i_4, L3)
      s_2 = PHI (s_1, entry), (s_3, L3)
      t1 = CMP_LE i_3, n_1
      JUMP_IF_NOT t1, L4
      JUMP L2
  L2:
      t2 = ADD s_2, i_3
      s_3 = t2
      JUMP L3
  L3:
      t3 = ADD i_3, 1
      i_4 = t3
      JUMP L1
  L4:
      RETURN s_2

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t4 = CALL sum, 10
      RETURN t4
